name: Iron Accord
description: Old-world corporate coalition controlling heavy industry and mercenary forces. They view the Underearth as a resource to be exploited rather than feared. Primary Upworld / Human power.

name: Hollow Covenant
motto: We are the children of what came before.
description: Theocratic-technocratic alliance of Chthon, Vesperid, and Nullborn leaders. Believe the Underearth is not a curse, but a gift — and that humanity’s future lies below. Primary Underworld power.

name: Ash Serpents
motto: The wasteland belongs to those bold enough to ride it.
description: Ruthless surface raiders and smugglers who specialize in deep Underearth runs. Known for using modified beasts as mounts.

name: Veilwardens
description: Secretive cult obsessed with recovering forbidden knowledge from the Underearth. Many members are Nullborn.

name: Neon Choir
description: Tech cult that worships and modifies unstable AI and cybernetics. Extremely fashionable in Riftspire’s underworld clubs.

name: Dust Parliament
description: Loose alliance of independent settlement leaders attempting to remain neutral between the Iron Accord and Hollow Covenant.

name: Bone Circuit
description: Controls much of Riftspire’s organ, cybernetic, and monster-part black market trade. Extremely dangerous and well-connected.

name: Black Ledger
motto: Knowledge is the only real currency.
description: Network of spies, hackers, and information brokers who sell secrets to the highest bidder. Operate across Riftspire and surface outposts. Motivation: profit and survival.

name: Last Caravans
motto: We carry everyone. We trust no one.
description: Massive convoys of heavily armed nomadic traders who travel between settlements. Fiercely protect their neutrality. Hate both major powers equally.

name: Echo Wardens
motto: The past must not be forgotten.
description: Small but respected archivists and historians dedicated to preserving pre-collapse knowledge. Maintain hidden archives and are generally left alone.
